summary: Iteration 3 testing complete - 100% backend pass (40/40 tests across regression + new) and 100% frontend critical-flow pass. Verified: bottom nav visible on ALL member routes (bug fix confirmed), FAB Submeter restricted to /calendar only (data-testid='fab-submit-event' count=1 on /calendar, 0 elsewhere), partnership detail with SVG barcode + BLACK lock, rewards catalog with 3 tabs and FALTAM indicators, event attendance Eu Vou/Vou toggle awarding +10 pts (verified via API), share modal with 6 options (WhatsApp, Telegram, Email, X/Twitter, Copiar, Close), admin Receita por Mês SVG chart present, points awarded for booking (+50), attend (+10), photo buy (+20), submission approval (+200), and Black-month redeem (rw_003) flips is_black=true.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 985 lines and growing - consider splitting into routers (auth, events, rewards, admin) for maintainability
REWARDS_CATALOG is hardcoded constant in server.py; if cost/value/title needs frequent edits, move to db.rewards collection seeded at startup

/api/admin/revenue/monthly does in-memory aggregation by streaming three full collections; for production scale use a Mongo $group aggregation pipeline keyed on a $substr/$dateToString of the timestamp

/api/events/{id}/attend awards +10 pts on EVERY toggle from false→true (user can farm by toggling off then on repeatedly). Consider tracking 'has_been_awarded' flag so points only granted once per event
/api/admin/events/{id}/approve awards +200 pts every time an event is re-approved (e.g., reject→approve cycle) - guard with a 'submitter_rewarded' flag
Cookie SameSite='none' + Secure is correct for cross-site preview but ensure same setting in prod; HttpOnly is set ✓
test_credentials: admin alexandrexbdcosme@gmail.com / Yanka.2003 ; member alex.member@scout.pt / scoutcreator ; legacy arthur@scout.pt / ScoutBlack2024!
seed_data_creation: Test users created during run with prefix it3_*@scout.pt, sub_*, sub2_*, buyer_*, del_* - cleanup not strictly performed but isolated to throwaway accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully passes. All endpoints in iter3 spec (rewards catalog/me/redeem, events/attend, events/attendance, admin/revenue/monthly) verified plus point awarding on book/attend/buy/approve/black-redeem. Front-end bug fix for bottom nav verified across /map /calendar /profile /partnerships /scout-black /rewards /events/:id /dashboard. FAB Submeter correctly restricted to /calendar only. Note: data-testid for FAB is 'fab-submit-event' (NOT 'submit-fab'). Event attend button is 'event-attend-btn' showing 'EU VOU' off / 'VOU' (with check) on. Share modal testid 'share-sheet' opened via 'event-share' click. Important code-quality concern: attend toggle awards +10 every time user re-attends after toggling off (point farming risk).
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. Initial false-positive failures in playwright run were due to case-sensitive text matching against UI components rendered with uppercase Tailwind classes (text-xs uppercase tracking-widest renders 'GASTAR' visually but inner text retains source case in some places). Re-tested with data-testid selectors and case-insensitive regex - all flows pass.
